name: batch-review
description: A loop workflow. Discovers a list of changed files, then reviews each one through the same checked sub-sequence. Shows type: loop with over / as.

steps.instruction: List every file changed in PR #{pr_number}.
steps.title: Collect Files

steps.instruction: Read {file} and summarize what changed and why.
steps.title: Read

steps.instruction: Review {file} for bugs, unsafe patterns, and style drift.
steps.title: Critique

steps.instruction: Give {file} a verdict: approve, or request changes with reasons.
steps.title: Verdict

steps.instruction: Roll the per-file verdicts up into one review for PR #{pr_number}.
steps.title: Summarize
